cards.title: Metadata
cards.governance_note: Define required fields, schemas, versions, access rules, quality notes, and stewardship.

cards.title: Provenance
cards.governance_note: Capture origin, source, creator, transformation history, and evidence links.

cards.title: Traceability
cards.governance_note: Connect inputs, processes, outputs, decisions, revisions, and audit events.

cards.title: Stewardship
cards.governance_note: Assign ownership and cadence for metadata quality and lifecycle review.
